content.rendered:
TIGGER
Where Your Money
Grows Bigger

TIGGER Where Your Money Grows Bigger

Design

TIGGER launched stealth with a small presale, zero taxes, LP burnt and contract renounced. My TIGGER , your TIGGER , $TIGGER for all – forever!

Idea

$TIGGER is the ticker. T-I-double guh-er, Tigger! Tigger is known worldwide for his love of bouncing and partying. Now he’s bouncing his way into the world of crypto to party it up and unleash wealth and happiness to others.

Built on Ethereum

Get Tigger

Tigger is supported on popular DeFi wallets like MetaMask

Buy On Uniswap
TIGGER is Available Worldwide

TIGGER is for you

No taxes, no nonsense.
Simple tokenomics make TIGGER sustainable & deflationary for the long term.
$TIGGER is the governance token for the entire TIGGER Ecosystem.

Community

TIGGER is a decentralized community movement that people can smile about! Leaders from various online communities will allocate resources toward the development of TIGGER’s future. Anyone with skills or time can contribute as part of a group or on their own to help advance TIGGER.

Trust & Transparency

Community took over the project after the development team and most of the presale participants sold their tokens early into the project. 82.27% of TIGGER supply was pooled in Uniswap liquidity pool. LP tokens burnt, and contract was renounced at launch! 17.73% of TIGGER supply has been burnt forever before community took over. The mission is for TIGGER to grow, survive and develop organically. Everyone gets an equal chance to own TIGGER.

0

Total Supply

0

Tokens Burned

0 %

Community Driven

Ready to buy a few TIGGER?

Download an Ethereum wallet like MetaMask. It’s free on the app store or google play. Desktop users can download the MetaMask chrome extension.

Next Steps

Buying TIGGER

Make sure your wallet has ETH. Buy ETH directly on Metamask or transfer it from another wallet or exchange.

Go to Uniswap. Connect your wallet and paste in the TIGGER contract address, select TIGGER and confirm. MetaMask will then prompt you for confirmation.

Swap ETH for TIGGER. Default Uniswap settings are fine so no need to adjust slippage settings.

Vibe and Chill.

Questions? Visit the MetaMask FAQ or Uniswap FAQ

Next Steps

Buying Tigger

Make sure your wallet has ETH. Buy ETH directly on Metamask or transfer it from another wallet or exchange.

Go to Uniswap. Connect your wallet and paste in the TIGGER contract address, select TIGGER and confirm. MetaMask will then prompt you for confirmation.

Swap ETH for TIGGER. Default Uniswap settings are fine so no need to adjust slippage settings.

Vibe and Chill.

Questions? Visit the MetaMask FAQ or Uniswap FAQ

A simple mission

Make TIGGER the most widely held meme coin.

Sound crazy? Meme coins combined have over 5 million wallets holding a balance.

Together, we can easily beat that!

 
 
 

Mission Control

TIGGER has reached escape velocity

ROADMAP

Where we’re going,
we don’t need roads

1. Create

2.Stealth Launch

3.Grow Holders

4.Trend

Join the #TIGGERarmy and help build the future of $TIGGER

Driven by the community

Expect Nothing. Expect Surprises.

Launch & Promotion

  • Launch TIGGER on Uniswap and other popular decentralized exchanges.
  • Announce TIGGER on social media channels like Twitter and Discord and crypto forums like Bitcoin Talk and Reddit
  • Early adopters are incentivized and rewarded for being early and then helping spread the word.
  • Approach influencers and crypto publications to promote and build awareness of TIGGER.
  • List on popular price tracking websites like Coinmarketcap and CoinGecko.

Community Building & Expansion

  • Engage with the TIGGER community through social media channels
  • Advocate for others to start their own TIGGER-focused community
  • Recommend top mobile apps and web wallets support TIGGER for easy access
  • Expand the use cases of TIGGER through partnerships with merchants or integration with other DeFi projects

Long-Term Sustainability & Growth

  • Continuously expand TIGGER availability to incentivize holding and reduce volatility
  • Diversify supporting teams and allocate resources towards further development and marketing efforts
  • Explore new opportunities for growth, such as launching on additional exchanges or integrating with other blockchain networks
  • Foster a strong and dedicated community to ensure long-term sustainability and growth of TIGGER
